title: Zingy Coconut Dal & Greens Soup
summary: Transform your Coconut Dal batch into a delicious hearty soup. With greens, zingy lemon and a jammy eggs on top, this one is speedy and incredibly comforting.

method.description: Make the Coconut Dal batch recipe.

Pour the Coconut Dal into a saucepan with the veg stock and bring to a gentle simmer. Stir through the spinach and cook for 2–3 mins until wilted. Squeeze in the juice of half the lemon and season with salt and black pepper.
Meanwhile, bring a pan of water to the boil. Gently lower in the eggs and cook for 6 mins. Transfer to a bowl of cold water to stop them cooking further. Peel and set aside.
Just before serving, stir half the yoghurt into the soup. Halve the eggs.

Ladle the soup into bowls and top with a swirl of the remaining yoghurt and the jammy eggs. Finish with pickled onions, coriander leaves and a crack of black pepper. Serve any leftover lemon wedges alongside.

chefs.name: Sophie Wyburd
chefs.summary:
Sophie Wyburd is a cook and food writer specialising in simple, hearty comfort food, informed by her love of cookbooks and background in restaurant kitchens. You can find her co-hosting the 'A Bit of a Mouthful' and 'I’ll Have What She’s Having' podcasts, and hosting sell-out supper clubs in London. Her debut cookbook 'Tucking In' will be released in June 2024.

Photo credit: Stuart Simpson
